message:
feat(twilio): implement secretless auth with CredentialId support and diagnostics

Major refactor for multi-auth provisioning automation:

- New TwilioAuth enum: Token (Basic auth) vs CredentialId (egress proxy
  with X-FCP-Credential-ID header injection)
- new_with_auth() constructor with conditional header setup
- TwilioConfig with strict xor validation (auth_token OR credential_id)
- handle_doctor() with 6-point readiness check (config, http_client,
  authentication, capability_verifier, session, credential_injection)
- handle_self_check() returning SelfCheckReport with degraded mode
- Enriched health endpoint with auth_mode and api_url fields
- doctor + self_check message routing in main.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,8 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut TwilioConnector, message: &str) -> serde
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params).await,
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect().await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
